# Deadlock API

## About
Deadlock API provides game statistics, hero analytics, item data, and leaderboards for the game Deadlock by Valve. It is a free, open-source community project.

## Key pages
- /heroes - Hero win rates, pick rates, matchups, and performance analytics
- /items - Item statistics, build combos, purchase timing analysis
- /abilities - Ability upgrade paths and win rates per hero
- /leaderboard - Ranked player leaderboard by region
- /badge-distribution - Rank distribution data over time
- /game-stats - Aggregate match statistics and trends
- /heatmap - Kill/death heatmap visualization on the game map
- /player-scoreboard - Top player performances ranked by stats
- /streamkit - Stream toolkit with chat commands and OBS widgets
- /chat - AI chat assistant for game data questions

## API
- Game data API: https://api.deadlock-api.com (OpenAPI spec: https://api.deadlock-api.com/openapi.json)
- Assets API: https://assets.deadlock-api.com (OpenAPI spec: https://assets.deadlock-api.com/openapi.json)
